race.comment: SHOGUN EXPRESS (6) switches to hurdling for the first time after a sound staying performance on the flat at Warrnambool at his latest outing when not completely handling the heavy track there that day. Paddy Payne will have him well schooled, and he can make an immediate impact. STEP IN TIME (8) heads into his jumping debut on the back of an impressive seven-length victory over 2350m  at Warrnambool in a weak field 2 weeks ago, and he commands plenty of respect. GRIPPING (4) made an encouraging start to his hurdling career when finishing runner-up over 3200m at Warrnambool a fortnight ago, and he will take plenty of benefit from the experience. Follow your money. PALENTINO HEIGHTS (5) has been gradually finding his feet over the jumps, improving into fourth at his latest appearance 4 weeks ago at Warrnambool, and another forward showing is expected. GOONDIWINDI (3) has yet to fire over jumps, but did win a recent hurdling trial, so keep an eye on any positive market moves.
